company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that uses AI to automate video editing workflows, helping YouTube and social media creators produce professional content faster.

policies.detail: No refunds are issued after 7 days from the date of purchase. Refunds within the first 7 days are reviewed on a case-by-case basis.
24/7 customer support is available exclusively for Pro plan subscribers. Basic plan subscribers receive support during business hours only.
AutoStream does not currently offer a free tier. New users may request a personalised demo by speaking with our sales team.
Subscriptions can be cancelled at any time. Access continues until the end of the current billing cycle.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support for export?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports direct export optimised for YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok, and standard MP4 formats.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade from Basic to Pro at any time. The price difference is prorated for the remaining days in your billing cycle.

faqs.question: Does AutoStream work with raw footage?
faqs.answer: Yes, AutoStream accepts raw footage in common formats including MP4, MOV, and AVI.
